name: uniai-creative-suite
description: UniAI Creative Suite — image & video generation, transcription, and professional documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF) in one bundle.

interface.longDescription: Generate images and videos, transcribe speech, and build professional, rendered-and-verified documents — Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), PowerPoint (.pptx) and PDF — plus image transforms (line-art, depth maps, photo restore). Models are chosen by the platform automatically.
